zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton I於大約1320年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir Gilbert Stapleton32歲，母親Agnes FitzAlan32歲。他於1353年與Alice St Philibert在英國越可爾卡爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1394年5月16日之後在英國越可爾懷吉爾，埋葬在英國越可爾希阿勞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton I于大约1320年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir Gilbert Stapleton32岁，母亲Agnes FitzAlan32岁。他于1353年与Alice St Philibert在英国越可爾卡爾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1394年5月16日之后在英国越可爾懷吉爾，埋葬在英国越可爾希阿勞。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Brian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Irish origin: perhaps from an Old Celtic word meaning ‘high’ or ‘noble’. The name has been perennially popular in Ireland, in particular on account of the fame of Brian Boru (Gaelic Brian Bóroimhe) ( c. 940–1014 ), a warrior who was credited with driving the Vikings from Ireland and who eventually became high king of Ireland. In the Middle Ages it was relatively common in East Anglia, where it was introduced by Breton settlers, and in northern England, where it was introduced by Scandinavians from Ireland. It was quite popular in Yorkshire in the early 16th century, largely because it had long been a family name among the Stapletons, who had Irish connections. They first used it after Sir Gilbert Stapleton married Agnes , the daughter of the great northern baron Sir Brian fitzAlan . In Gaelic Scotland it was at first borne exclusively by members of certain professional families of Irish origin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: Variant of   Brian  , influenced by the usual spelling of the associated surname.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton I was born about 1320, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Gilbert Stapleton, was 32 and his mother, Agnes FitzAlan, was 32. He married Alice St Philibert in 1353, in Carleton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died after 16 May 1394, in Wighill, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Healaugh, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton I est né environ 1320, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gilbert Stapleton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes FitzAlan, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Alice St Philibert en 1353, à Carleton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé après 16 mai 1394, à Wighill, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Healaugh, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton I um 1320 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gilbert Stapleton 32 und seine Mutter Agnes FitzAlan 32. Er hat 1353 in Carleton, Yorkshire, England Alice St Philibert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb nach 16. Mai 1394 in Wighill, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Healaugh, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton I è nato il circa 1320 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Gilbert Stapleton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Agnes FitzAlan, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Alice St Philibert nel 1353, nel Carleton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 16 maggio 1394, nel Wighill, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolto a Healaugh, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton Iが約1320年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Gilbert Stapletonは32歳，母Agnes FitzAlanは32歳であった。1353年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカーレトンでAlice St Philibertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1394年5月16日以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアウィギルで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヒーラウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton I(이)가 대략 1320년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gilbert Stapleton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes FitzAlan(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1353년 영국 요르크실르 칼턴에서 Alice St Philibert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1394년 5월 16일 이후 영국 요르크실르 와이이에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 히로그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton I nasceu aproximadamente 1320, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gilbert Stapleton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Agnes FitzAlan, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice St Philibert em 1353, em Carleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu após 16 de maio de 1394, em Wighill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Healaugh, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton I родился около 1320 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Gilbert Stapleton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes FitzAlan, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice St Philibert в 1353 г. в местности карлетон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер после 16 май 1394 г. в местности ваиилл, еркшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности хило, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Alice St Philibert en 1353, en Carleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de 16 de mayo de 1394, en Wighill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Healaugh, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
